content_body:
I would first like to tell the owner a HUGE thank you for helping us all get up the mountain in the snow and ice!!! Also, thank you to everyone who helped out from the rental company. Every time I would email them with a question, the response was right away. Everyone involved was very helpful and pleasant to deal with.

This cabin is gorgeous and perfect for a big group. We definitely would love to rent this cabin again and even bring the kids. We all have little boys (3 years old – 5 months old) and they would love to see the train go by and catch fish from the river. We absolutely would love to return!!! Thank you again!
title: Adults' Getaway
